headline: Amazon To Rally Over 29%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Thursday
summary: Wall Street analysts updated ratings and price targets for top companies, including Robinhood, Westlake, Genmab, Levi Strauss, Generac, General Mills, and Amazon.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Generac Holdings, Raises Price Target to $300
summary: Citigroup  analyst Vikram Bagri   maintains Generac Holdings (NYSE:GNRC) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $263 to $300.
